de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement

          • recoder.java.reference.TypeReference
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RKeYMetaConstructType
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYRecoderExtension, Serializable, Cloneable, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement

    public class RKeYMetaConstructType
extends TypeReference
implements KeYRecoderExtension
